summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of TradeLife SaaS dashboard. All requirements verified successfully including layout, components, interactivity, and design specifications.
passed_tests: Dashboard page loads successfully at /dashboard route
Top bar displays all required elements: logo (T), TradeLife text, Command Center label, notifications button, settings button, user avatar
Left column Attention Needed section shows 3 items with colored indicators
Left column Active Projects section shows 3 projects with progress bars (72%, 45%, 90%)
Left column Active Trades section shows 4 trades with status dots and correct statuses
Center column AI Core placeholder displays with CPU icon and description
Center column shows 3 action buttons: New Quote, New Invoice, Reports - all clickable
Center column overview grid displays 4 stat cards: Revenue, Expenses, Net Profit, Outstanding
Right column Schedule section shows 4 time-slotted items
Right column Urgent Tasks section shows 4 items with red dots
Right column Financial Overview shows 3 progress bars and profit margin
Dark theme colors confirmed: background #0b0b0f, surface #141419, white/gray text
3-column responsive grid layout working (12-column grid, 3-6-3 ratio)
Clean design confirmed - no glow effects, no glass effects, no particles
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes
All buttons are clickable and functional
Content counts verified: 3 attention items, 3 projects, 4 trades, 4 schedule items, 4 urgent tasks
